candidates.why: This appears to be the total current interest-bearing debt, with components such as Commercial Paper, Current portion of non-current loans, and Loans from fnancial institutions shown beneath it. Best match for short-term debt and avoids double counting.
Captures current maturities of long-term debt, but may omit other short-term borrowings such as commercial paper; less complete than the current total interest-bearing line.
Component of short-term debt, but not complete if other current borrowings exist.
Short-term debt component, but not complete on its own.
Could be a current debt component in this section, but not complete on its own.

variables.notes: OK. Chose a label outside the shortlist because it is the clean current total for interest-bearing liabilities. Excluded lease rows per instruction and avoided summing components to prevent double counting.
